title: Talk about routines changing
subtitle: Compare old and new routines.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I used to study only when I had free time.
我过去只在有空时学习。
Now I study for twenty minutes every day.
现在我每天学习二十分钟。
I used to study sometimes, but now I study every day.
我过去有时学，但现在每天学。

items.en: I used to study only when I had free time.
items.zh: 我过去只在有空时学习。

items.en: Now I study for twenty minutes every day.
items.zh: 现在我每天学习二十分钟。

items.en: I used to study sometimes, but now I study every day.
items.zh: 我过去有时学，但现在每天学。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I used to study sometimes, but now I study every day.
lines.zh: 我过去有时学，但现在每天学。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Now I study for twenty minutes every day.
lines.zh: 现在我每天学习二十分钟。

items.en: I used to study only when I had free time.
items.zh: 我过去只在有空时学习。

items.en: Now I study for twenty minutes every day.
items.zh: 现在我每天学习二十分钟。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
